queries.question: Show both courses with peer tutoring and courses with group work where either has 10 participants.
queries.sql:
SELECT courses.courseName
FROM peer_tutoring JOIN courses ON courses.courseID = peer_tutoring.courseID
WHERE peer_tutoring.participants = 10
UNION
SELECT courses.courseName
FROM group_work JOIN courses ON courses.courseID = group_work.courseID
WHERE group_work.participants = 10
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?peer_tutoring a :peer_tutoring .
    ?courses a :Courses .
    ?peer_tutoring p:hascourses ?courses .
    ?courses p:courseName ?coursename .
    ?peer_tutoring p:participants ?participants_f .
    FILTER((STR(?participants_f) = "10" || STR(?participants_f) = "10.0"))
    BIND(?coursename AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?group_work a :group_work .
    ?courses a :Courses .
    ?group_work p:hascourses ?courses .
    ?courses p:courseName ?coursename .
    ?group_work p:participants ?participants_f .
    FILTER((STR(?participants_f) = "10" || STR(?participants_f) = "10.0"))
    BIND(?coursename AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show all courses with peer tutoring and also show only courses with group work which have 10 participants.
queries.sql:
SELECT courses.courseName
FROM peer_tutoring JOIN courses ON courses.courseID = peer_tutoring.courseID
UNION
SELECT courses.courseName
FROM group_work JOIN courses ON courses.courseID = group_work.courseID
WHERE group_work.participants = 10
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?peer_tutoring a :peer_tutoring .
    ?courses a :Courses .
    ?peer_tutoring p:hascourses ?courses .
    ?courses p:courseName ?coursename .
    BIND(?coursename AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?group_work a :group_work .
    ?courses a :Courses .
    ?group_work p:hascourses ?courses .
    ?courses p:courseName ?coursename .
    ?group_work p:participants ?participants_f .
    FILTER((STR(?participants_f) = "10" || STR(?participants_f) = "10.0"))
    BIND(?coursename AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What courses have peer tutoring and group work with 10 participants?
